mapper.select: SELECT p.post_id as postId, p.title, u.nickname as authorNickname, u.email as authorEmail, p.created_at as createdAt, p.is_public as isPublic, p.rec_id as recId, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_comment c WHERE c.post_id = p.post_id) as commentCount FROM board_post p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.user_id ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
